implement.detail: SECURITY - real role->capability layer replacing the permissive can() stub (super-admin/org-admin: all four; user: canUseChat+canCreateArtifacts; null/unknown role: nothing, fail-closed). builder->user rename swept across shared enum + api + web + locales (PT Utilizador), with an idempotent boot-step migration (role rewrite + DURABLE tokenEpoch bump) + a verify-chokepoint legacy-JWT shim. Capability gates on ALL user-reachable app build/edit vectors: POST /jobs first-build (canBuildApps) + follow-up (canEditApps + loadWritable ownership, CLOSING the cross-tenant follow-up-build IDOR), chat (canUseChat), artifact-create (canCreateArtifacts), AND (codex-round) import/fork (canBuildApps) + bundle-update/file/versions-restore/backend/backups (canEditApps, app-type-aware via isAppArtifact so users keep non-app artifacts). Durable tokenEpoch+billingLocked on UserDoc loaded at boot (revocation + billing lock survive restart). Follow-up TOCTOU re-validated at execution via the revalidateWritable seam. Machine-readable PT-PT refusals (FORBIDDEN + details.capability). can() PERMISSIVE-STUB marker removed.

test.detail: full api lane 1522 passed / 1 pre-existing skip (+16 over the pre-H1 baseline): capabilities matrix (replaces the deleted stub test), role-migration idempotence + verifyToken normalization + DURABLE-boot revocation, jobs-capability integration (first-build/follow-up/IDOR/oracle), artifacts-capability integration (import/fork/bundle-update/file/restore/backend/backups app-type-aware, non-app allowed), contract 403-envelope+details.capability. web lane 167 passed. tsc(src+test) + web tsc clean, eslint 0, chokepoint clean

securityWall.detail: gitleaks clean on all commits; chokepoint grep clean; fail-closed capability matrix (null/unknown role -> nothing); no PERMISSIVE-STUB marker survives (H5 grep gate will confirm); durable revocation persisted; the served-app plane + app-sso untouched

liveVerification.detail: zero-LLM-cost curl probe on the credentialed stack (slices/H1/live-probe.md): user first-build 403 canBuildApps + follow-up 403->404 (capability before ownership, existence-oracle closed) + chat 202; codex-fix re-probe: non-app create 201 (canCreateArtifacts retained), import 403 canBuildApps live, app-edit vectors denied. Machine-readable PT-PT FORBIDDEN + details.capability envelope confirmed live. The org-admin allow path + per-vector capability precision are proven by the integration suites (no LLM build burned)

freshReview.detail: VERDICT: APPROVE (slices/H1/review-verdict.md) - fresh-context security review; acceptance met, IDOR closed, matrix fail-closed, contract additive; no High/Medium

codexSliceReview.detail: gpt-5.5/high first pass NEEDS-WORK with 2 High + 1 Med + 1 Low - ALL real, ALL fixed in 49dc5f6: (High) non-durable epoch/billingLocked revocation -> persisted+boot-loaded (also closed the carried LANDING billingLocked-at-boot platform finding); (High) ungated app build/edit vectors beyond /jobs -> isAppArtifact-gated app-type-aware; (Med) follow-up TOCTOU -> revalidateWritable seam at execution; (Low) existence oracle -> forbidden collapses to 404 local to the gate. Codex RE-review of the delta (slices/H1/codex-review-2.md): all four CLOSED with file:line, 'NEW: none found' on each. VERDICT: APPROVE. (One codex re-review invocation hung and was killed + re-run - the completing run is authoritative.)

designAudit.reason: api/security slice; the only UI change is the role label rename (Utilizador), covered by the web users-page test

walkthrough.detail: live-probe.md (curl transcripts of the deny/allow gate decisions on the running stack, both the initial and codex-fix rounds)
